debug_info.goal: ⊢ {f | (∀ (x : ↑(Set.Ioi 0)), 0 < f x) ∧ ∀ (x : ↑(Set.Ioi 0)), ∃! y, ↑x * f y + ↑y * f x ≤ 2} = IMO2022P2.answer

failed_attempts:
unfold answer
  ext f
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨hpos, huniq⟩
    funext x
    have hx := huniq x
    obtain ⟨y, hy, huniq'⟩ := hx
    -- The unique solution property forces f(x) = 1/x
    sorry
  · intro hf
    subst hf
    constructor
    · intro x
      simp only [one_div]
      exact inv_pos.mpr x.prop
    · intro x
      use x
      constructor
      · simp only [one_div]
        have hxpos : (0 : ℝ) < x := x.prop
        field_simp
        linarith
      · intro y hy
        simp only [one_div] at hy
        have hxpos : (0 : ℝ) < x := x.prop
        have hypos : (0 : ℝ) < y := y.prop
        have h : (x : ℝ) / y + (y : ℝ) / x ≤ 2 := by
          field_simp at hy ⊢
          linarith
        have amgm : (x : ℝ) / y + (y : ℝ) / x ≥ 2 := by
          have := div_add_div_le_iff (ne_of_gt hypos) (ne_of_gt hxpos)
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x : ℝ) - y)]
        have heq : (x : ℝ) / y + (y : ℝ) / x = 2 := le_antisymm h amgm
        have hsq : ((x : ℝ) - y)^2 = 0 := by nlinarith
        have : (x : ℝ) = y := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x : ℝ) - y)]
        exact Subtype.ext this

        have h : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x ≤ 2 := by
          convert hy using 1
          field_simp
          ring
        have amgm : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x ≥ 2 := by

            (by positivity) (by positivity) (by field_simp; ring)
          linarith
        have heq : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x = 2 := le_antisymm h amgm
        have : (x : ℝ) / y = y / x := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x : ℝ) / y - y / x)]
        have : (x : ℝ)^2 = (y : ℝ)^2 := by field_simp at this; linarith [sq (x : ℝ), sq (y : ℝ)]
        have : (x : ℝ) = (y : ℝ) := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x : ℝ), sq_nonneg (y : ℝ)]

          · field_simp at this ⊢
